text:
From: Seawind Chartering <chartering@seawind.com.hk>
Sent: Friday, September 12, 2025 12:38 PM
To: chartering@seawind.com.hk <chartering@seawind.com.hk>
Subject: SEAWIND FIRM REQUIREMENT - SMAX/UMAX - 1TCT / ECI TO WAFR

PLEASE PROPOSE SUITABLE RATED TONNAGE FOR OUR

FULLY FIRM & BOOKED CARGO

ACCT SEAWIND ( OUR USUAL ONE )
- SMAX / UMAX (CAN TRY 50K DWT SUB INTAKE)
- LAYCAN: 15 SEP ONWARD (FLEXIBLE DATES)
- DELY: APS KAKINADA
- RE-DELY: W.AFR (EXCL HRA)
- 1TCT WITH H'LESS BAGGED RICE
- DURATION: ABT 70 DAYS WOG
- NEED ICA
- 3.75 PCT ADCOM HERE
